pi_items.verified_value: USLCI FY24 Q4 from NREL Federal LCA Commons (FLCAC); available at https://github.com/FLCAC-admin/uslci-content in JSON-LD format
pi_items.source: install_openlca.sh:173-186 shows download from https://github.com/FLCAC-admin/uslci-content/raw/dev/downloads/uslci_fy24_q4_01_olca2_4_0_elci_lib_json_ld.zip; Web search confirmed USLCI is real NREL database with 550+ processes including steel manufacturing

Task description mentions 'Steel, plate, at plant' and 'Hot rolled sheet' as example processes; Web search confirmed USLCI database on lcacommons.gov includes steel manufacturing processes such as 'Galvanized steel coil, coated, at plant'

Task description requires modifying 'Electricity' and 'Natural gas' input exchanges; verifier.py:119 specifically checks for report containing 'electr', 'gas', or 'fuel' keywords; steel manufacturing processes in USLCI are confirmed to include electricity and natural gas inputs as primary energy sources

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the USLCI (U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database) FY24 Q4 release from NREL's Federal LCA Commons, a real public life cycle inventory database containing over 550 production processes. The database includes steel manufacturing processes with both electricity and natural gas inputs. The task requires cloning a steel process, reducing electricity inputs by 20% (target ratio 0.8) and fuel inputs by 12% (target ratio 0.88), with a 5% tolerance for verification. All metadata paths and reduction values have been independently verified against task scripts and the task description.
